personal.name: Thota Sujith Reddy
personal.bio: I'm Thota Sujith Reddy, a dedicated B.Tech student at VIT University, Vellore. I'm pursuing Computer Science and Engineering with a specialization in Data Science. I bridge the gap between complex backend data structures and sleek, responsive frontend user interfaces, striving to build applications that are as intelligent as they are beautiful.
personal.availability: I'm actively seeking exciting engineering opportunities. I'm open to full-time roles, internships, and collaborations in Data Science, Machine Learning, and Software Engineering.
personal.workingHours: I'm usually online from 9:30 AM to 11:30 PM IST
personal.responseTime: I typically reply within 2-4 hours during active hours

projects.title: SMS Finance Analyzer
projects.description: Built a privacy-first RAG pipeline using Gemini 2.5 Flash and ChromaDB to analyze financial SMS patterns. Features a 200+ term knowledge base, multi-factor fraud detection with automatic PII masking, and a Streamlit/FastAPI web app processing 600+ requests/hour with sub-2s latency.

projects.title: Financial Sentiment Analysis
projects.description: Fine-tuned a pre-trained FinBERT model on 20,000+ financial news articles to achieve 87% accuracy in sentiment classification. Implemented advanced NLP preprocessing, attention masking, and a comprehensive evaluation framework to identify key financial indicators.

projects.title: Online Retail Spend Prediction
projects.description: Engineered an end-to-end ML pipeline on a massive UCI dataset (397k+ transactions) to predict 30-day customer spend, achieving an R2 of 0.883. Developed robust RFM-based temporal features and dual prediction pipelines, benchmarked against XGBoost and LightGBM.

faq.a: Yes! I'm actively seeking exciting engineering opportunities. I'm open to full-time roles, internships, and collaborations in Data Science, ML, and Software Engineering.

My strongest skills are Python (92%, 3 years, 14 projects), Pandas (95%), and Machine Learning with TensorFlow and Scikit-learn. I specialize in building end-to-end ML pipelines and RAG-based AI applications.
My CGPA at VIT University is 8.7 / 10.
Yes! I built this entire portfolio using React. I'm comfortable with React, Framer Motion, Vite, and modern frontend development practices.
You can reach me at sujithreddy1546@gmail.com or connect on LinkedIn. I typically reply within 2-4 hours during active hours (9:30 AM - 11:30 PM IST).
